blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 110 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 35°F.
